sizing_rule.note: Parametric optimal f using normal distribution of trade outcomes and population standard deviation. Exact calculation formula not provided in excerpt. More sophisticated than Kelly as it accounts for full spectrum of outcomes rather than binary outcomes. Requires: normally distributed trade outcomes, estimated population std dev, calculated arithmetic mean trade.

source_rule_text: Use parametric optimal f technique based on normally distributed trade outcomes and population standard deviation to determine position sizing, which is more powerful than Kelly formula as it accounts for full spectrum of outcomes rather than just two possible outcomes.
